feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Question about Feature 10EET and what is sent to BSI in the EPC EP parameter
entry.content:
We recently discovered that feature 10EET was misconfigured in our environment - we had it returning just the number (as in "1") rather than the full string "EETYID 1" and thus the "EP:" Employment Type parameter was missing altogether in the BSI interface for all employees.

We resolved the issue so it now correctly returns "EETYID 1" for nonresident workers and BSI receives "EP: 1" on the program-to-program interface, thus correctly withholding the De Minimis taxes.

However, in our implementation of feature 10EET we are returning "0" (an invalid value) for all other employees, causing the "EP:" parameter to be excluded from those employees. Is there any harm in configuring it this way, or should we be returning "EETYID 0" for employees that don't require a special designation?

In my testing, there was no difference when they were sent with "EP: 0" vs an absent "EP:" field.

For reference, these are the valid values for the "EP:" Employment Type parameter:

0 - Regular Active Employee (Tax as if a regular active employee.)

1 - Mobile Workforce Employee (Use non-resident minimums.)

2 - Terminated Employee

4 - Deceased - Private Sector (Tax using deceased rules for the Private Sector.)

5 - Deceased - Railroad Employee (non ICC-eligible) (Tax using deceased rules for a Railroad Employee.)

6 - Deceased - Public Sector (Tax using deceased rules for the Public Sector.)

7 - Active ICC-eligible Railroad Employee

8 - Deceased ICC-eligible Railroad Employee

9 - Flight Crew Employee

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I want to extract the data from excel to web applications using SAP Build Process Automation, how I need to do any one can help me out of this.

entry.title: Creating customers (as vendors with PRAA)
entry.content:
Hi,

in SAP-Standard there is transaction PRAA, which creates/updates/locks vendors from Employee master data. So far so good, it works.

Now i have the requirement that also CUSTOMERS (manually created over FD01/XD01) should be created/updated/locked from Employee master data OR from the vendor created over PRAA.

Please not that ist is NOT an S4/HANA System (its an "old" EHP 8 System) and Business Partners are NOT activated.

I can't find any standard transaction/report for that issue. Any ideas ?

br Martin

entry.title: Payment Workbench Media(PMW)- Check print for HR PAYROLL issues
entry.content:
Hi all

we are trying to convert from using RFFOUS_C to SAPFPAYM(FBPM) for FI and HR systems.

For FI, we are able to accomplish without much issues. We configured FBZP and OBPM* and Adode interface structures (FPAHX, FPAH, IT_FPAY) has all the information we need to print check from FBPM.

I am trying to replicate this in our HR system but I can see that CALL FUNCTION 'RP_IMPORT_PAY_STATEMENT'

is getting called to bring in the payroll information but this FM is not part of program SAPFPAYM(FBPM). What is the right way to accomplish this to get HR info in FBPM?

any ideas would be appreciated it?

entry.title: My Team Calendar Fiori date is not based on the profile
entry.content:
In App My Team Calendar Fiori date is not based on the profile date.

I changed date profile to Islamic Date or Iranian Date or Japanese Date but date again show me in Gregorian Date format only and I can not change My Team Calendar date base on my profile date.

entry.title: anual perks is not calculating for separated employee
entry.content:
Dear Guru's

Annual perk is not calculating while maintain info type 416 for leave encashment exemption.

with out infotype 416 record:

annual perk is calculating :

with info type 416 record:

annual perk is not calculating :

kindly please help us why annual perk is not generating while maintain leave encashment exemption.

entry.title: wage types generation
entry.content:
Hello;

I have a question, can someone please help me

how to ensure that a wage types is only generated once a week:

Example: if the employee is present at work on Monday, then the wage types is generated, but on Tuesday even if he is present, the wage types must not be generated for the rest of the week, likewise, if the wage types is not generated on Monday because the employee is absent, on Tuesday he is present,the wage types is generated, and the same, it must not be generated the rest of the week.

here is the rule and shema used :

thank you in advance for your help

entry.title: Problem with description of wage type in tab Additional Payments using transaction PC00_M32_TRM0
entry.content:
Problem in the transaction PC00_M32_TRM0 with Tab "Additional Payments".

I execute transaction PC00_M32_TRM0 and read some variant that contains more than one wage type, then when I clic on Tab "Additional Payments" descriptions for all wage types are filled with description of the last one. After that, if I press ENTER, automatically all wage type descriptions are filled correctlly. This is after an upgrade to the system (QAS).

entry.title: SU53 Reset User Buffer , but for other User. How i can ?
entry.content:
Hello Community , 

i want to Reset User Buffer , from SU53 Transaction , to clear all authorizations Errors but not for me , for other User.

How can i do this ?

Thanks

entry.title: Time evaluation ZL issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

When I run the Time Evaluation for the month  the ZL wage type is not generating . when I run the Time Evaluation for pay period the ZL Wage type is generating with hours from the custom PCR wrongly. The wage type should not generate when I run the month and the pay period. May be the buffer of the ZL is not clearing from the PCR. Any one has idea on this. could you please help me to solve this.

 

Thanks

Revathi.

 

Warm Regards,

Revathi.

entry.title: Necessity HCM integration activation on SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Dear Experts.

We are now planning to conversion from SAP ECC6.0 to S/4HANA2023 for HCM.

On SAP Note2340095, I found the following description;"With the conversion to SAP S/4HANA the implementation of the employee business partner is mandatory".
Reference:https://me.sap.com/notes/2340095/E

We use PERNR data on SAP HCM ECC6.0 now, but don't and won't need to use the BP master for payment, because we make payment data using only SAP Standard Program(RPCSC000 etc) on HCM without FI-AP.

Could anyone give me an idea whether we should activate the HCM integration and make BP master record per employee in this case or not?

If neccesary info to answer is lacked, ask it to me.

Best regards.

entry.title: Lift and shift for HR Mini master
entry.content:
Hi All,

do we any documentation on Lift and shift for HR Mini master from ECC to S/4 hana ?

Thanks,

Venu

entry.title: Posting infotype 14 WAGE TYPE TO different WBS
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a specific wage type (BONUS) amount in infotype 14 , which should be posted to WBS Element during payroll posting. 

i have checked infotype 27, but it allows to split only on payroll or travel.

How can i post only BONUS from infotype 14 to a specific WBS element in FINANCE. please advice.

entry.title: Leave Quota through PT60
entry.content:
We are generating Leave Quota through PT60 where PL is generated in January every year whereas for new joiners PL is generated after 1 year from Joining Date on pro-rata basis. Unutilized Leaves will lapse on every 31st December.

In addition to this, for new joiners, we want: -

  • PL Quota to be generated on completing 6 months.
  • This Quota will not lapse on 31st December of the year in which employee has completed 6 months.

How to configure this?

entry.title: Leave Quota through PT60
entry.content:
We are generating Leave Quota through PT60 where PL is generated in January every year whereas for new joiners PL is generated after 1 year from Joining Date on pro-rata basis. Unutilized Leaves will lapse on every 31st December.

In addition to this, for new joiners, we want: -

  • PL Quota to be generated on completing 6 months.
  • This Quota will not lapse on 31st December of the year in which employee has completed 6 months.

How to configure this?

entry.title: Outbound IDOC Missing: Segment E1P1000 is missing in E1PLOGI for Basic type HRMD_A07?
entry.content:
Hello Dears,
Greetings!

I am working on outbound IDOC.

Basic type: HRMD_A07

Message type: HRMD_A

I am using the Tcode: PFAL to send the HR Master data from SAP using Outbound IDOC to the target system and it generates all segments without missing.

However, when we run the RBDMIDOC program it generates the Idoc segment E1P1001 only, the other segment is not generated for example employee master data (E1P0000, E1P0001, E1P0002, etc...), and E1P1000.

I have checked the IDOC, and the whole segment E1P1000 is missing/does not exist in the main segment E1PLOGI.

Why the segment E1P1000 and other segments missing/do not exist in the main segment E1PLOGI?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,
Ibro Nur

entry.title: Variable Pay Executive Review
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have noticed that when we export the executive review, there is not a way to distinguish if the extracted amount is in Functional currency, or not.

We noticed that the export follows the settings, that is, if we select Functional currency, the excel is in functional currency, and if we select Employee Local Currency, the excel is in local currency.

Is there a way to be able to make the distinction when exporting?

Thanks and regards,

Alekxia

entry.title: Job Requisition
entry.content:
How to streamline the incorporation of job requisition route maps within business protocols, such as dynamically activating distinct approval pathways based on whether the requisition is for a new position or a replacement? and also like if within Budget or over the Budget etc. 

Can anyone please help on it. Thank you.

entry.title: No entry in table $ for key $ 554C 3401 20230 Technical error no. 72
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While Running time evaluation, i got this error

No entry in table $ for key $ 554C 3401 20230
echnical error no. 72
1.09.2023 Processing terminated for EE 

It appeared after i made a new entry on  V_T510S.  I tried to make a new wage type selection rule since the wage type for overtime worked isnt showing on the payroll run, even thought the overtime quota number is recorded on the TIP table. 

Please help me solve this issue

Thanks, 

Kelvin

entry.title: Wrong generation of final date of absenteeism quota from time evaluation (2006)
entry.content: When evaluating personnel times, the system is generating the wrong final deduction date, it is not entering 31129999. Has anyone had this problem?
